message:
fix(tests): add type annotations for type inference errors

Add explicit type annotations to fix Rust type inference issues in test code:
- runtime/task_handle.rs: Add Result type annotations for oneshot::send calls
- runtime/state.rs: Add Result type annotation for oneshot::send in create_task
- stream/mod.rs: Add Future trait imports for poll() method access
- stream/fold.rs: Add String type annotation for closure parameter

Also includes new stream combinator files (any_all, collect, count, fold,
for_each, next, try_stream) that were part of the stream module expansion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
